title: Bijeljina, Republika Srpska — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bijeljina, Republika Srpska: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bijeljina is a city in Republika Srpska with a population of 107,000. A city in northeastern Bosnia in the Semberija region, known for its agricultural production, the Etno Selo Stanišić complex, and its proximity to the Drina River.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
